data.body: Explore publishing a knots API that supports event subscription. Investigate RPC frameworks (gRPC, Connect, Cap'n Proto, etc.) that can generate bindings for TypeScript, Rust, and native platforms (Swift). Key considerations: event/subscription model (streaming, webhooks, SSE), schema-first design, multi-language codegen quality, and suitability for local-first architecture.
data.title: Explore API publication with event subscription support
